overall.description: First-person helicopter cockpit view from a flight simulator game, flying through dense haze over a sprawling urban area at dawn. The aircraft transitions from city overflight to coastal waters, following a long bridge structure while lighting shifts from warm golden to cool gray tones.

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter straight over dense urban area through heavy haze

entered.detail: AS350 helicopter instrument cluster with flight gauges and GPS display
dense collection of high-rise buildings visible through golden haze
tall commercial towers with glass facades
residential and office buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The helicopter maintains steady flight over a sprawling metropolitan area blanketed in thick golden haze. The instrument panel remains fixed in the foreground while the urban landscape stretches below, with clusters of high-rise buildings emerging from the atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal transition zone between city and open water

events.description: urban landscape gives way to coastal waters as the helicopter banks left
ambient light shifts from warm golden to cooler gray tones as helicopter moves through haze

agents.ego_description: executing a left bank turn while transitioning from urban to coastal airspace

entered.detail: calm coastal water appearing on the left side of the frame
forested landmass jutting into the water with buildings along the shore

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks left, revealing a vast body of water on the left while the urban coastline recedes to the right. The lighting gradually cools from golden dawn to gray overcast as the aircraft leaves the dense city behind and approaches the open water.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal water crossing following bridge structure

events.description: long suspension bridge becomes visible below, spanning across the water

agents.ego_description: following the bridge trajectory while maintaining altitude over the water

entered.detail: long bridge structure with multiple spans crossing the water below
forested islands visible through the haze on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: Now flying entirely over water, the helicopter follows the path of a long suspension bridge that stretches into the hazy distance. The surrounding landscape consists of forested islands and coastlines barely visible through the thick gray atmosphere, with the bridge providing the primary visual reference below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight from a golden, haze-shrouded metropolis toward a cool, overcast coastal expanse. It begins with a steady glide over a sprawling urban landscape where high-rise buildings emerge from a thick golden fog beneath a fixed instrument panel. As the helicopter banks left, the city coastline recedes to the right and the warm dawn light gradually shifts into a muted gray as the aircraft approaches the open water. The scene then opens up entirely over the sea, where the camera follows the linear path of a long suspension bridge stretching into the distance. Finally, the view settles on a hazy atmosphere where forested islands and distant coastlines are barely visible through the thick gray mist.
